---
# Outbound public to badip (ioc ip join)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

IOC enrichment — correlate live events against an indicator IP lookup via join. Outbound public to badip. the `is_*` address helpers return a boolean (false, not null, on non-match); `count_distinct()` is the distinct-count (never `dcount`).

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_remote_ip != null | alter dst_private = is_known_private_ipv4(action_remote_ip) | filter dst_private = false | join type = inner (dataset = gx_03_ioc_ip) as ioc ioc.indicator = action_remote_ip | comp count() as conns, count_distinct(agent_hostname) as hosts_touched by threat, severity | sort desc severity, desc conns | limit 50
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (ran clean). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
